name: morsebrowser-react
description: React/React Native migration of the Long Island CW Club's Morse code practice trainer: a TypeScript monorepo with a shared Morse engine (@morsebrowser/core), a Vite + React + Bootstrap web app, and an Expo/React Native iOS app featuring native background audio for lock-screen practice. Note: scoped to exclude ~1100 bulk content/data records (word lists, preset JSON, binary assets) and focus on architecture.
